title: <div>| **9:30–11:30 AM** | **Creative Expansion I** | High-output play block (de
content:
| **9:30–11:30 AM** | **Creative Expansion I** | High-output play block (design, write) | Flow unlocked. Batch ideation. Be nonlinear. Test things. |
| **11:30–1:00 PM** | **Integration Buffer** | Eat, walk, emotion-check, no meetings | Process emotional wave. Don’t rush decisions or commit. |
| **1:00–3:00 PM** | **Tinker + Test** | Iterate, fail fast, remix | Line 3 energy activated → experimentation = alignment |
| **3:00–6:00 PM** | **Resonant Peak** | Execute vision, present ideas, speak | Birth time alignment. Throat defined = speak to manifest |
| **6:00–7:30 PM** | **Social Spark** | Collaborate, brainstorm, sync with others | You become magnetic here. Seek external response. |
| **7:30–9:00 PM** | **Cooldown / Archive** | Journal, organize outputs, light edits | Reflect & sort. Hermit energy begins returning. |
| **9:00 PM+** | **Emotional Digest + Reset** | Baths, music, decompression, ritual | Emotional authority → clarity comes before sleep |

---

## 📘 \[CC02\] SCHEDULE ARCHETYPE: W4V-RHYTHM: MG32

### 🔁 FLOW MODEL
